name: pr-review-toolkit-himmel
description: [yotamleo fork — vendor + verify-before-critical patch, see README.md] Minimal fork of pr-review-toolkit. Vendors only the code-reviewer agent with the HIMMEL-178 verify-before-critical sub-rule patched in. All other agents (silent-failure-hunter, comment-analyzer, pr-test-analyzer, type-design-analyzer, code-simplifier) stay upstream — invoke via pr-review-toolkit:* namespace.
